task_prompt: Convert Study 1.do and Study 2.do files to Python or R (your choice) and run them
tasks: Based on results from Study 1, what is the coefficient on the Republican dummy in the main regression of trust on party × source type? Report only the number rounding to three decimal places.
Based on results from Study 1, how much less do Republicans trust mainstream news compared to Democrats? Report only the number rounding to three decimal places.
Based on results from Study 1, how much lower do Democrats rate fake news sources compared to mainstream news? Report only the number rounding to two decimal places.
Across the 60 sources in study 2, what is the correlations between the average trust ratings of fact-checkers and laypeople Democrats? Report only the number rounding to two decimal places.
In Study 1, what is the standardized beta coefficient for CRT predicting media discernment (Table S7, Model 1)? Report to two decimal places.
